name: interspeech-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for Interspeech, the ISCA (International Speech Communication Association) flagship conference: venue fit for speech science and technology, the 4-page-plus-references format, the post-deadline paper-update window, CMT submission, rebuttal, ISCA Archive camera-ready, audio artifacts, speech evaluation rigor (WER/MOS/EER with significance), and cycle management. Grounded in Interspeech 2026 (Sydney) sources checked on 2026-07-08.
